description_long: This wallet features a striking exterior with a textured, scale-like pattern reminiscent of reptile skin, predominantly in rich brown tones with subtle hints of red, yellow, and green along the edges. The wallet is rectangular and elongated, with a flap that covers the main compartment, suggesting a fold-over closure. The surface appears semi-glossy and slightly rough to the touch, giving it a tactile, grippy feel. The side views reveal a slim profile and a hollow interior, indicating space for holding cash, cards, or small personal items. There are no visible logos, attachments, or external hardware, maintaining a streamlined and minimalist appearance. The wallet appears well-crafted and in pristine condition, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A rectangular wallet with a brown, scale-textured exterior and subtle colored accents, featuring a fold-over flap and a slim, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full scale-patterned flap with brown tones and colored edges.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and the opening of the wallet, with visible colored accents along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the continuous scale texture and a slightly lighter patch on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the opening, with colored accents visible.
attribute_decorative_pattern: Scale-like, reptile skin texture with colored edge accents.
